heading: Disclosure or use of information by preparers of returns
label: 6713 Disclosure or use of information by preparers of returns
notes: Amendments2019—Subsecs. (b) to (d). added subsec. (b) and redesignated former subsecs. (b) and (c) as (c) and (d), respectively.Pub. L. 116–25

children.text: discloses any information furnished to him for, or in connection with, the preparation of any such return, or
uses any such information for any purpose other than to prepare, or assist in preparing, any such return,

children.heading: Enhanced penalty for improper use or disclosure relating to identity theft
children.label: b Enhanced penalty for improper use or disclosure relating to identity theft

children.heading: Separate application of total penalty limitation
children.label: 2 Separate application of total penalty limitation
children.text: The limitation on the total amount of the penalty under subsection (a) shall be applied separately with respect to disclosures or uses to which this subsection applies and to which it does not apply.

children.heading: Exceptions
children.label: c Exceptions
children.text: The rules of section 7216(b) shall apply for purposes of this section.

children.heading: Deficiency procedures not to apply
children.label: d Deficiency procedures not to apply
children.text: Subchapter B of chapter 63 (relating to deficiency procedures for income, estate, gift, and certain excise taxes) shall not apply in respect of the assessment or collection of any penalty imposed by this section.
